name: Beet Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash beets and leave a 1-inch stem intact.
2. Cook the beets with a little salt until tender.
3. Drop the cooked beets into cold water to slip off the skins.
4. Slice or cube the beets.
5. Bring syrup (made from equal parts sugar and water) to a good boil, then add the beets and boil again for 1-2 minutes.
6. Pack the pickled beets into sterile jars with the boiling syrup, leaving some headspace.
7. Seal the jars immediately while they are still hot.
